no_entries_match: Pe tye coc mo ma rwatte ki yer ni
quick_fill_label: 🧠 Coc Oyot — Tit gin ma otimme
quick_fill_hint: AI bi niang lok ni dok keto i kabedo me cito piny. Itwero loko ki cingi.
generating_questions: ⏳ Tye ka cweyo lapeny me kit ma lok obedo kwede...
quiz_fba_purpose: Tic madit pa FBA obedo ngo?
quiz_replacement: Kit kwo me leyo (replacement behavior) obedo ngo?
search_placeholder: Yeny gin ma okwongo, kit kwo, gin ma olubbe, kor lok, kabedo...
quick_fill_placeholder: lapor: "Latin kwan obayo waraga i kare me cwaro mege kwan i kare ma kilwongo en me nyuto tic, lapwony oloko cwiny ne ma kuc"
nl_edit_placeholder: lapor: "lok gin ma olubbe me bedo ni lapwony oloko cwiny ne"
reinforce_step_1: Caki ki miyo mot ma poll (lapor: FR-1 onyo FR-2)
reinforce_step_2: Ka kit kwo doko jirre (~80%), med ratio ki 1-2
reinforce_step_3: Lokke i lwong me variable (VR) pi gwoko me kit ma yot
reinforce_step_5: Lokke i miyo mot ma pe nwoyere/ma yot
fidelity_tip_1: Yeny yore me tic kacel ki jo me tic
fidelity_tip_2: Mi pwony mukene me BST (Behavioral Skills Training)
fidelity_tip_3: Yot yore ka tye matek twatwal
fidelity_tip_4: Tam i kom gin ma gengo tic i kabedo
record_tip_1: Med gin ma otimme nyim, i kare ne, ki lacen me kit kwo
record_tip_2: Lwong kabedo/ka ma otimme iye ka itwero
record_tip_3: Itwero mwono coc me peko mapol
record_tip_4: Tic ki tito lok ma cok, ma neno ki wang
quiz_opt_identify_why: Me ngeyo PINGO kit kwo timme
quiz_opt_any_stops: Kit kwo mo keken ma juko peko
ph.a_break_help_someone_to_listen_space: Yweyo? Kony? Dano me winyo? Kabedo?
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: Med kor lok pa team... (Shift+Enter pi pol manyen)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: Med lok mubedo, gengo, onyo peko mogo... lapor: "Latin kwan bene tye ki peko me lok" onyo "Man en aye latin kwan me middle school"
ph.any_other_details_was_child_tired_hun: Lok mukene mo (latin obedo me ool, kec, etc.)...
ph.behavior_name_from_sessions: Nying me kit kwo (ma a ki i session)...
ph.describe_the_scenario_you_want_to_pra: Tit kit me peko ma imito tic kwede...
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: Tit kit pa latin kwan... lapor: "Ibedo latin kwan me grade 3 ma cing ne pige i kare me cwaro mege kwan dok kuro kuro ki pe tiyo..."
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: lapor: "Ka token economy dwoko piny kit kwo ma pe i tic i kare me pwony me cwaro mege kwan?"
ph.eg_hitting_peers_when_frustrated: lapor: Goyo lawote i kare me cwiny rac
ph.eg_offtask_behavior_in_math: lapor: Kit kwo ma pe i tic i kare me cwaro mege kwan
ph.eg_student_is_defiant_and_refuses_to_: lapor: "Latin kwan kwero winyo dok kwero lubo lapeny."
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: lapor: "latin kwan ki autism", "ki ADHD bene", "manyen i gang kwan"
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: Ket cobo me kit kwo me poko (lapor: "Latin kwan bibedo i kom kom ne i kare me tic kene pi dakika 15")
ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_: Lok me kwo ne (antecedent ango ma man tiyo iye?)
ph.reflect_on_your_approachn_what_worked:
Tam i kom yore ni...
• Gin ango ma otiyo maber?
• Gin ango ma onongo itimo ki te mukene?
• Yore ango ma imito tic kwede manen?
ph.setting_eg_math_class_cafeteria: Kabedo (lapor: Kwan me cwaro mege kwan, Ka cam)
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Tit gin ma ineno paco — teko, peko, cik me kwo, onyo tam pi team me gang kwan...
ph.target_behavior_what_you_want_to_redu: 🎯 Kit kwo ma imito (gin ma imito dwoko piny)
ph.type_your_observation_note_or_click_t: Coo gin ma ineno, kor lok, onyo dii i mic me coo ki dwan...
ph.type_your_response_here_be_thorough_a: Coo dwoko ni kany. Bed ki tit malong ki tic ki leb me tic...
ph.what_could_you_or_a_grownup_do_differ: Gin ango ma in onyo dano madit twero timo ki te mukene?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: Lok mene ma ibilokko i kabedo?
ph.what_made_you_feel_this_way_optional: Gin ango ma omiyo iwinyo kit man? (ka itamo)
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: Gin ango ma onongo timme nyim me winyo ni kit man?
